directives.directive: When improving the brain system, avoid duplicate same-purpose logic, jobs, hooks, or pipelines running concurrently. Reuse or centralize existing mechanisms first because duplication wastes resources and can destabilize the system.
For substantial Brain feature/fix decisions, debate with Claude via local CLI as a critical advisor before choosing implementation; capture the artifact and implement the best evidenced decision.
directives.context: Chris explicitly set Claude debate as the default for Brain improvement decisions on 2026-05-07.
